SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.pageloader

Packages that use io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.pageloader
Package
Description
io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer
Contains the core viewer model, including the central ViewManager, physical and structural record elements, page navigation, MIME type handling, and supporting value types used across the viewer presentation layer.
io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.pageloader
Provides strategies for loading record pages, with eager, lean, and empty implementations of the IPageLoader interface.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.pageloader used by io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer
    Class
    Description
    IPageLoader
    Interface for loading and navigating the physical pages of a digitized record.
    SelectPageItem
    Extends JSF SelectItem to support a double-page mode where the item value is returned as a hyphen-joined pair (e.g.

    Description
    AbstractPageLoader
    Abstract base class for page loaders that retrieve page metadata for a digitized record from the index.

    Interface for loading and navigating the physical pages of a digitized record.
